hero.subtitle: Stop losing memories in infinite camera rolls. Keeptrip transforms your routes, photos, and dates into a living digital passport that tells your story.

liveRoutes.title: Living Routes
liveRoutes.description: Your trips are not static points. Document each stop and let the map connect your story in an interface built for explorers.

timeline.title: Travel Logs
timeline.description: Replace the cold gallery with an immersive journal. Add anecdotes, feelings, and connect each photograph to its historical moment.

gallery.title: Modern Digital Archive
gallery.description: Your unforgettable moments, automatically curated effortlessly. Forget about lost folders and generic galleries.
